da.hero_subtitle: Skabt fra et ønske om at løfte yoga fra hverdagsrutine til et dybere niveau
da.philosophy_text: Yoga Bible skaber et miljø, hvor erfarne instruktører guider dem, der ønsker at udvikle sig — fysisk, mentalt og professionelt. Uanset om dit mål er at forfine din egen praksis, blive instruktør eller arbejde professionelt med yoga, giver Yoga Bible viden, struktur og inspiration til at tage dit næste skridt.
da.philosophy_quote: Mere end uddannelse — det er et fællesskab for dem, der vil mere fra deres yoga.
da.ess1_desc: At gøre yoga til mere end bevægelse — men en kilde til viden, selvindsigt og indre balance. Her møder du yogaens dybde for første gang.
da.ess2_desc: Dybde i anatomi, filosofi, teknik og undervisningsmetoder. Du opbygger den faglige ekspertise, der gør dig til en kompetent yogalærer.
da.ess3_desc: At dele din viden med andre — som lærer, mentor eller inspirationskilde. Du bringer yoga videre til dem, der har brug for det.
da.essence_closing: Det er essensen af Yoga Bible.
da.origin_title: Fra Triangle Yoga Academy til Yoga Bible
da.origin1_desc: Grundlagt i København med ét mål: at skabe den bedste yogalæreruddannelse i Skandinavien. Hundredevis af yogalærere har fået deres certifikat her — med fokus på praksis, fordybelse og fællesskab.
da.origin2_desc: En naturlig videreudvikling. Yoga Bible samler uddannelser, kurser, workshops og tre unikke koncepter under ét navn — med samme kerneteam, samme kvalitet og alle certificeringer fuldt gyldige og anerkendt af Yoga Alliance (USA).
da.origin_note: Alt, du kender fra Triangle Yoga Academy, lever videre — blot under et nyt navn.
da.concepts_subtitle: Yoga Bible er mere end en skole — det er et univers af specialiserede koncepter, der hver bringer noget unikt til yogaens verden.
da.concept1_desc: Københavns førende hot yoga studio med infrarød opvarmning, frozen towel shavasana og sonic healing-ritualer.
da.concept2_desc: Live yoga streaming med rigtige undervisere i realtid. Aldrig optaget, altid autentisk — yoga uden filtre.
da.concept3_desc: Verdens første vibroakustiske yogastudio. Gulvvibrationer og Dolby Atmos skaber en helt ny kropslig oplevelse.
da.copenhagen_text: Yoga Bible holder til på Torvegade i Christianshavn — et af Københavns mest charmerende kvarterer med kanaler, kaféer og en afslappet stemning, der passer perfekt til yogaens ånd.
da.testimonial_quote: Yoga Bible ændrede mit liv. Ikke bare som yogalærer, men som menneske. Uddannelsen gav mig redskaber, selvtillid og et fællesskab, der stadig bærer mig.
da.faq_subtitle: Overgangen til Yoga Bible ændrer ikke på værdien af dine uddannelser — her kan du læse, hvad rebrandet betyder for dig.
da.faq1_q: Er mit certifikat stadig gyldigt, hvis jeg blev uddannet under Triangle Yoga Academy?
da.faq1_a: Ja, alle certifikater udstedt under navnet Triangle Yoga Academy er fortsat fuldt gyldige. Yoga Bible er en naturlig videreudvikling af samme akademi og står stadig bag de tidligere uddannelser.
da.faq2_q: Hvad er forskellen mellem Triangle Yoga Academy og Yoga Bible?
da.faq2_a: Triangle Yoga Academy var starten på vores rejse — et sted for dygtige yogalærere og engagerede elever. Yoga Bible udvider dette fundament med et større fokus på uddannelse, workshops og fællesskab, og bringer alle vores projekter sammen under ét navn.
da.faq3_q: Kan jeg stadig deltage i workshops og uddannelser som før?
da.faq3_a: Ja, fuldstændig. Vi fortsætter med de velkendte formater — men udvider løbende med nye kurser, læringsforløb og events, så du kan fordybe dig endnu mere i din praksis.
da.faq4_q: Er mit certifikat stadig godkendt af Yoga Alliance (USA)?
da.faq4_a: Ja, præcis som før. Alle certifikater udstedt gennem vores uddannelser forbliver anerkendt af Yoga Alliance (USA), også efter overgangen til Yoga Bible.
da.faq5_q: Kan jeg fortsætte min uddannelse og tage en højere grad, f.eks. 300 timer?
da.faq5_a: Ja, vi tilbyder 300-timers og avancerede certificeringer, der bygger videre på din 200-timers uddannelse.
da.faq6_a: Yoga Bible holder til på Torvegade 66, Christianshavn — midt i København med nem adgang fra hele byen.
da.cta_title: Klar til at Begynde Din Rejse?
da.cta_text: Udforsk vores 200-timers yogalæreruddannelse og find det format, der passer dig bedst.

en.hero_subtitle: Born from a desire to elevate yoga from everyday routine to a deeper level
en.philosophy_text: Yoga Bible creates an environment where experienced instructors guide those who wish to develop — physically, mentally, and professionally. Whether your goal is to refine your own practice, become an instructor, or work professionally with yoga, Yoga Bible provides the knowledge, structure, and inspiration to take your next step.
en.philosophy_quote: More than education — it is a community for those who want more from their yoga.
en.ess1_desc: Making yoga more than movement — a source of knowledge, self-insight, and inner balance. Here, you encounter the depth of yoga for the first time.
en.ess2_desc: Depth in anatomy, philosophy, technique, and teaching methods. You build the professional expertise that makes you a competent yoga teacher.
en.ess3_desc: Sharing your knowledge with others — as a teacher, mentor, or source of inspiration. You bring yoga forward to those who need it.
en.essence_closing: That is the essence of Yoga Bible.
en.origin_title: From Triangle Yoga Academy to Yoga Bible
en.origin1_desc: Founded in Copenhagen with one goal: to create the best yoga teacher training in Scandinavia. Hundreds of yoga teachers received their certification here — with a focus on practice, immersion, and community.
en.origin2_desc: A natural evolution. Yoga Bible brings trainings, courses, workshops, and three unique concepts under one name — with the same core team, the same quality, and all certifications fully valid and recognized by Yoga Alliance (USA).
en.origin_note: Everything you know from Triangle Yoga Academy lives on — just under a new name.
en.concepts_subtitle: Yoga Bible is more than a school — it is a universe of specialized concepts, each bringing something unique to the world of yoga.
en.concept1_desc: Copenhagen's leading hot yoga studio with infrared heating, frozen towel shavasana, and sonic healing rituals.
en.concept2_desc: Live yoga streaming with real teachers in real time. Never recorded, always authentic — yoga without filters.
en.concept3_desc: The world's first vibroacoustic yoga studio. Floor vibrations and Dolby Atmos create a completely new bodily experience.
en.copenhagen_text: Yoga Bible is located on Torvegade in Christianshavn — one of Copenhagen's most charming neighborhoods with canals, cafés, and a relaxed atmosphere that perfectly matches the spirit of yoga.
en.testimonial_quote: Yoga Bible changed my life. Not just as a yoga teacher, but as a person. The training gave me tools, confidence, and a community that still carries me.
en.faq_subtitle: The transition to Yoga Bible does not change the value of your education — here you can read what the rebrand means for you.
en.faq1_q: Is my certificate still valid if I trained under Triangle Yoga Academy?
en.faq1_a: Yes, all certificates issued under the Triangle Yoga Academy name remain fully valid. Yoga Bible is a natural evolution of the same academy and continues to stand behind all previous trainings.
en.faq2_q: What is the difference between Triangle Yoga Academy and Yoga Bible?
en.faq2_a: Triangle Yoga Academy was the start of our journey — a place for skilled yoga teachers and dedicated students. Yoga Bible expands this foundation with a greater focus on education, workshops, and community, bringing all our projects together under one name.
en.faq3_q: Can I still participate in workshops and trainings as before?
en.faq3_a: Yes, absolutely. We continue with the familiar formats — but are constantly expanding with new courses, learning paths, and events so you can deepen your practice even further.
en.faq4_q: Is my certificate still recognized by Yoga Alliance (USA)?
en.faq4_a: Yes, exactly as before. All certificates issued through our trainings remain recognized by Yoga Alliance (USA), even after the transition to Yoga Bible.
en.faq5_q: Can I continue my education and take an advanced certification, e.g. 300 hours?
en.faq5_a: Yes, we offer 300-hour and advanced certifications that build on your 200-hour training.
en.faq6_a: Yoga Bible is located at Torvegade 66, Christianshavn — in the center of Copenhagen with easy access from the entire city.
en.cta_text: Explore our 200-hour yoga teacher training and find the format that suits you best.
